companies.name: Nordex Industries Ltd
companies.description: Nordex Industries Ltd is a diversified industrial manufacturer specializing in engineered components for transportation, construction, and energy end-markets.

companies.name: Lumina Energy Corp
companies.description: Lumina Energy Corp is an integrated energy company focused on exploration, production, and marketing of oil and natural gas, with a growing renewable portfolio.

companies.name: Summit Bankcorp Inc
companies.description: Summit Bankcorp Inc is a regional banking group providing retail and commercial banking, wealth management, and treasury services.

companies.name: Riverstone Bancshares Ltd
companies.description: Riverstone Bancshares Ltd operates a network of community banks focused on small business lending and consumer banking services.

companies.name: Harborview Bank Group
companies.description: Harborview Bank Group is a mid-sized banking organization offering retail, corporate, and transaction banking with a focus on coastal metropolitan areas.

companies.name: Aurora Regional Bank
companies.description: Aurora Regional Bank is a community-focused lender providing consumer and SME banking services across regional markets.

companies.name: Quantum Tech Systems plc
companies.description: Quantum Tech Systems plc develops enterprise cloud platforms, cybersecurity solutions, and advanced data analytics products for global customers.

companies.name: Orion Microdevices Corp
companies.description: Orion Microdevices Corp designs and manufactures high-performance semiconductors for communications, automotive, and industrial applications.

companies.name: Pioneer Infrastructure Partners
companies.description: Pioneer Infrastructure Partners owns and operates transportation, logistics, and social infrastructure assets under long-term concession agreements.

companies.name: Greenwave Renewables Ltd
companies.description: Greenwave Renewables Ltd develops and operates wind, solar, and battery storage projects with long-term power purchase agreements.

companies.name: Pacific Utilities Corporation
companies.description: Pacific Utilities Corporation provides regulated electricity and gas distribution services across several western regions.

companies.name: Solis Energy Group
companies.description: Solis Energy Group is an independent power producer with a portfolio of solar and gas-fired generation assets.

companies.name: Altair Software Inc
companies.description: Altair Software Inc provides SaaS-based productivity, collaboration, and workflow software for mid-market enterprises.

companies.name: Novus Healthcare Holdings
companies.description: Novus Healthcare Holdings operates hospitals, outpatient clinics, and digital health services across multiple regions.

companies.name: Metro Retail Group
companies.description: Metro Retail Group is a multi-format retailer operating department stores, discount outlets, and e-commerce platforms.

companies.name: Titan Industrials plc
companies.description: Titan Industrials plc is a global engineering group providing capital equipment and services to mining, energy, and transportation sectors.

companies.name: Helix Biopharma Ltd
companies.description: Helix Biopharma Ltd is a biotechnology company focused on oncology and immunotherapy drug development.

companies.name: Bluehorizon Logistics Corp
companies.description: Bluehorizon Logistics Corp provides integrated freight, warehousing, and last-mile logistics services to global customers.

announcements.title: Quantum Tech Systems plc - Q1 2025 Results Announcement
announcements.content: Quantum Tech Systems plc today announced its financial results for the first quarter ended 31 March 2025. Revenue grew 14% year-on-year driven by cloud security subscriptions, with operating margin expanding by 120 basis points. Management will host a webcast to discuss the results and outlook.

announcements.title: Titan Industrials plc - FY 2024 Full Year Results
announcements.content: Titan Industrials plc releases its audited financial statements for the year ended 31 December 2024. The Group reported solid growth across all divisions, strong free cash flow generation, and announced a proposed final dividend, subject to shareholder approval at the AGM.

announcements.title: Metro Retail Group - FY 2024 Results and Investor Call Details
announcements.content: Metro Retail Group today published its results for the financial year 2024, highlighting resilient like-for-like sales and continued growth in e-commerce. Management will host a results conference call and webcast for analysts and investors, with details provided herein.

announcements.title: Orion Microdevices Corp - Q1 2025 Earnings Call and Webcast Invitation
announcements.content: Orion Microdevices Corp will host a conference call and webcast to discuss its first quarter 2025 financial results. The call will follow the release of the results and will include a question-and-answer session with senior management.

announcements.title: Summit Bankcorp Inc - Declaration of Q2 2025 Interim Dividend
announcements.content: The Board of Summit Bankcorp Inc has declared an interim cash dividend for the second quarter of 2025 of $0.18 per share, payable on 30 May 2025 to shareholders on record as of 20 May 2025.

announcements.title: Riverstone Bancshares Ltd - Recommendation of 2024 Final Dividend
announcements.content: Riverstone Bancshares Ltd announces that its Board has recommended a final cash dividend in respect of the financial year 2024 of $0.24 per share, subject to shareholder approval at the forthcoming AGM. If approved, the dividend will be paid on 10 June 2025.

announcements.title: Lumina Energy Corp - 2025 Interim Dividend Announcement
announcements.content: Lumina Energy Corp announces an interim dividend for 2025 of $0.22 per share. The shares will trade ex-dividend from 25 June 2025, with payment scheduled for 10 July 2025.

announcements.title: Lumina Energy Corp - Appointment of Independent Non-Executive Director
announcements.content: Lumina Energy Corp announces the appointment of Ms. Karen Mitchell as an independent non-executive director with effect from 10 February 2024. Ms. Mitchell will also join the Audit and Sustainability Committees.

announcements.title: Lumina Energy Corp - Changes to Board Committee Memberships
announcements.content: Lumina Energy Corp announces changes to the composition of its Board committees, including the appointment of Mr. David Chen as Chair of the Remuneration Committee and the rotation of members on the Audit Committee, effective 18 July 2024.

announcements.title: Lumina Energy Corp - Board Chair Succession
announcements.content: Lumina Energy Corp announces that, following a planned succession process, the Board has appointed Ms. Alicia Gomez as Non-Executive Chair of the Board with effect from 5 November 2024, succeeding Mr. Robert Hayes, who will remain on the Board as a non-executive director.

announcements.title: Titan Industrials plc - Changes to the Board and Committees
announcements.content: Titan Industrials plc announces the retirement of long-serving non-executive director Mr. James O’Connor and the appointment of Ms. Leila Farah as an independent non-executive director. Ms. Farah will join the Audit and Sustainability Committees, effective 1 October 2023.

announcements.title: Pacific Utilities Corporation - Appointment of Sustainability Committee Chair
announcements.content: Pacific Utilities Corporation announces the appointment of Dr. Monica Lee as Chair of the Board Sustainability Committee with effect from 1 April 2024. Dr. Lee has served as an independent non-executive director since 2020.

announcements.title: Pioneer Infrastructure Partners - Proposed Acquisition of Toll Road Assets
announcements.content: Pioneer Infrastructure Partners announces that it has entered into a conditional agreement to acquire a portfolio of regional toll road assets. The transaction is subject to shareholder approval at an Extraordinary General Meeting and customary regulatory clearances.

announcements.title: Bluehorizon Logistics Corp - 2025 Capital Markets Day
announcements.content: Bluehorizon Logistics Corp will host a Capital Markets Day on 18 September 2025 to provide an update on its strategy, financial targets, and technology investments. The event will include presentations from senior management and a Q&A session.

announcements.title: Nordex Industries Ltd - FY 2024 Preliminary Results
announcements.content: Nordex Industries Ltd announces its preliminary unaudited financial results for the year ended 31 December 2024, ahead of the publication of its 2024 Annual Report and audited financial statements.

ipos.description: Initial public offering of Nordex Industries Ltd on the Main Market, providing growth capital for expansion of its engineered components business.
IPO of Lumina Energy Corp to fund development of upstream oil and gas assets and early-stage renewable projects.
IPO of Greenwave Renewables Ltd supporting the construction of utility-scale wind and solar projects.
IPO of Solis Energy Group to refinance existing debt and fund new solar generation capacity.
IPO of Bluehorizon Logistics Corp to accelerate investments in automated warehouses and last-mile delivery networks.
Real estate investment trust focused on urban residential properties in major metropolitan areas.
Provider of industrial automation and robotics solutions for manufacturing and logistics clients.
Initial public offering of Bluewave Payments Holdings Inc, a provider of omni-channel digital payment solutions for merchants and financial institutions.
IPO of Aurora Regional Bank to strengthen regulatory capital and support branch network expansion.
IPO of Metro Retail Group to fund store refurbishments, digital transformation initiatives, and debt reduction.
